svg.title: Token Usage Dashboard — telemetry
svg.desc: Animated token usage telemetry: 51.3B tokens over 85 days, 93.0% cache hit, $51,020.63 estimated cost, 12,879 sessions, peak 5.9B on 06-06, reasoning tokens visible at 33.2% of output. Pure SVG SMIL — particle atom orbits and precomputed 3D wireframes, no JavaScript.
